referential_task.1.player.chat_transcrip: [22:07:09] matcher: Hello!  [22:07:15] director: Let's start with a medium-sized, animal-shaped wicker basket that looks like a rabbit. It has a light brown color, a detachable lid, and features like decorative eyes and nose. Can you find this one?  [22:10:10] matcher: I think I have 2 that look like rabbits. What direction is it facing?  [22:10:14] director: This rabbit-shaped basket should be facing forward, allowing you to see its decorative eyes and nose clearly. It also has a detachable lid. Does that help narrow it down?  [22:10:33] matcher: does it have whiskers?  [22:10:36] director: Yes, this basket does have whiskers along with its decorative eyes and nose. Does that help you identify it?  [22:12:12] matcher: alright. I believe I've gotten it, can we move onto the next basket?  [22:12:14] director: Next, we have a medium-sized round wicker basket. It stands out with a decorative diamond pattern near the rim and a large wooden handle. There’s no lid on this one. Can you spot it?  [22:17:18] matcher: I think I have two that might be similar. Does it have a pointed bottom or a flat bottom?  [22:17:21] director: This basket has a flat bottom, and remember, it features a decorative diamond pattern near the rim and a large wooden handle. Does that help you distinguish it?  [22:18:02] matcher: got it. next please  [22:18:07] director: The next basket is a medium-sized rectangular wicker basket with a natural light brown color. It features a woven texture, a central arched handle, and importantly, it has a hinged lid. Can you find this one?  [22:18:26] matcher: is it open on one side?  [22:18:26] director: No, this basket is not open on one side. It has a hinged lid, which means it can be completely closed. Does that help you identify it?  [22:18:38] matcher: in the photo, is it open or closed?  [22:18:40] director: In the photo, the basket is closed. The hinged lid is a key feature.  [22:18:51] matcher: does it have a double handle?  [22:18:52] director: No, this basket does not have a double handle. It features a single central arched handle. Does that help you find it?  [22:19:04] matcher: got it.  [22:19:05] director: Next, we have a medium-sized oval wicker basket featuring alternating bands of light brown and white. It has a single arching handle with decorative wrappings and no lid. Can you spot this one?  [22:19:17] matcher: got it.  [22:19:18] director: The next basket is a medium-sized oval wicker basket with a natural brown color. It features a twisted wicker handle and a checkered weave pattern. Does that help you identify this one?  [22:19:56] matcher: can you say more about the color? is the weave textured, and is the handle taller than the basket  [22:20:00] director: The basket has a natural brown color and a checkered weave pattern that gives it a textured look. The handle is about the same height as the basket itself and is distinctly twisted. Can you find it?  [22:20:50] matcher: is the middle a very different color from the rest of the basket?  [22:20:52] director: No, the color is consistent throughout the basket, maintaining its natural brown tone. The checkered pattern might create some visual variation, but it's not a different color. Does that help?  [22:21:01] matcher: got it.  [22:21:03] director: Great! Now, let's find the next one. We have a medium-sized round wicker basket with a smooth woven texture. It has a domed top resembling an animal head, featuring decorative elements like ears, eyes, and whiskers, and stands on four small feet. Can you spot this one?  [22:21:37] matcher: got it.  [22:21:38] director: Next up, we have a medium-sized rectangular wicker basket with a woven texture. It features a striped pattern of brown and greenish tones, an arched wicker handle, and a braided rim. Can you find this basket?  [22:22:07] matcher: got it.  [22:22:09] director: Now, we're looking for a medium-sized round wicker basket with a woven texture. It features alternating brown and beige bands, a large arched handle, and small white decorative dots along the top edge. Can you locate this one?  [22:22:57] matcher: great! got it.  [22:23:00] director: Next, we're looking for a medium-sized round wicker basket with a light beige and dark brown alternating pattern and a single large arching handle. Can you find this one?  [22:23:11] matcher: is it very round?  [22:23:13] director: Yes, it's distinctly round in shape, with the alternating light beige and dark brown pattern enhancing its appearance. Can you spot it?  [22:23:29] matcher: got it.  [22:23:30] director: Next, we're looking for a large cylindrical wicker basket. It has a natural brown color and features a woven texture. It comes with two looped handles and an open-top design with a braided rim. Can you find this one?  [22:24:12] matcher: is it taller than it is round?  [22:24:12] director: Yes, this basket is taller than it is wide, emphasizing its cylindrical shape. Does that help you find it?  [22:24:30] matcher: got it.  [22:24:31] director: Great! Now, let's find the next basket. It's a medium-sized round wicker basket with a natural brown color and darker accents. It features a diagonal woven pattern and has two looped handles, without a lid or additional decorations. Can you spot this one?  [22:25:13] matcher: Is it very round?  [22:25:14] director: Yes, it's distinctly round, with the diagonal woven pattern and the two looped handles being key features. Can you find this one?  [22:25:24] matcher: got it.  [22:25:25] director: Next, we're looking for a medium-sized, oval wicker basket. It has a light brown color, a woven texture, and features a single large curved handle along with a braided rim. Can you locate this one?  [22:25:40] matcher: is it tall or squat?  [22:25:42] director: The basket has a more squat appearance, with its oval shape and curved handle contributing to this look. Does that help you identify it?  [22:26:19] matcher: is it two-toned?  [22:26:21] director: No, this basket is not two-toned. It has a consistent light brown color throughout. Can you find it now?
